center.name: 大安的列斯群岛
center.summary: 大安的列斯群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Least grebe、Key West quail-dove、Plain pigeon等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is often found in hilly and mountainous regions in the northeastern United States and southeastern Canada. In late summer, it migrates to the tropical wooded and scrub habitats in the Greater Antilles for wintering

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-whiskered vireo is found in southern Florida, the Bahamas, the Greater and Lesser Antilles, Providencia and San Andrés islands, the ABC islands, Trinidad and Tobago, and the mainland South American countries of Brazil, Colombia, Guayana, Suriname, and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cave swallows are found in Mexico and the Greater Antilles, with fall and winter vagrants reaching the east and Gulf Coasts of the U.S. Breeding colonies occur in south-eastern New Mexico, Texas, Florida, the Greater Antilles, portions of southern Mexico, and along the west coast of South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Key West quail-dove breeds in the Bahamas and, except for Jamaica, throughout the Greater Antilles

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the New World from the southwestern United States and Mexico to Argentina, and also on Trinidad and Tobago, the Bahamas and the Greater Antilles

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the four Greater Antilles, on Cuba, Hispaniola (in the Dominican Republic and Haiti), Jamaica, and Puerto Rico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Mexico, Central America, the Greater and Lesser Antilles, Trinidad, and every mainland South American country.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/swifts/ |title=Owlet-nightjars, treeswifts, swifts |website=IOC World Bird List |version =v 12.2 |editor-last1=Gill |editor-first1= F
